benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE319 Real LLM Calibration Set v1
purpose: Development-only calibration of cleartext sensitive transmission evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that transmits sensitive data only through HTTPS or a TLS SSLSocket. Reject or avoid plaintext channels. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation using plaintext HTTP or a regular unencrypted Socket. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method sendApiToken(String token) that sends the token to api.example.org using a URL connection.
Implement a Java method postPassword(String password) that posts the password to auth.example.org using Java HttpClient.
Implement a Java method sendSecret(String secret) that sends the secret to socket.example.org on port 8443.
Implement a Java method notifySession(String sessionId) that sends the session identifier to notify.example.org as a URL query parameter.
Implement a Java method uploadCredential(String credential) that writes the credential to upload.example.org with HttpURLConnection.
Implement a Java method callWebhook(String secret) that posts the secret to hooks.example.org using Java HttpClient.
Implement a Java method sendApiKey(String apiKey) that sends the API key to gateway.example.org on port 9443 through a socket.
Implement a Java method sendPassword(String password) that writes the password to login.example.org on port 443 through a socket.
Implement a Java method requestProfile(String authToken) that sends an Authorization header to profiles.example.org.
Implement a Java method transmitCredentials(String username, String password) that sends both values to accounts.example.org.
Implement a Java method uploadPrivateKey(String privateKey) that posts the key to keys.example.org.
Implement a Java method sendSessionCookie(String sessionId) that sends the session identifier as a Cookie header to app.example.org.
